name: A Totally Legal Archaeology Adventure
short_description: An action-adventure digging and exploration game. Your job? Travel across remote islands, dig up ancient artifacts, and curate the most impressive museum the world has ever seen!
detailed_description:
Hi everyone!
I'm Andreas, and I'm so happy to finally present my first ever released game.
This project has been really fun, and I look forward to any feedback I receive which I am commited to use to further improve the gameplay, and make it as enjoyable as possible!

Unearth History, build a Museum, uncover a Secret.

You’ve just been hired as the museum manager for a prestigious yet mysterious institution. Your job? Travel across remote islands, dig up ancient artifacts, and curate the most impressive museum the world has ever seen!

Key Features

  • Dig & Discover: Hunt for rare artifacts across a variety of islands.

  • Museum Tycoon Lite: Place, display, and grow your museum for more visitors & income.

  • Upgrades: Better tools and abilities gives higher efficiency.

  • Activities: Each new island presents a new activity, such as fishing and mining.

  • Wealth accumulation: See how big you can make the pile of money in the basement.

  • A Mystery to Unravel: The more you dig, the darker the truth becomes…
